mapper.select: select t1.* from app_auction_up t1 left join app_auction t2 on t2.id=t1.car_id where t2.car_state = 3 and t1.begin_time IS NULL and t2.source_type = 1
select t1.* from app_auction_up t1 left join app_auction t2 on t2.id=t1.car_id where t2.up_state=1 and t2.car_state=7 and to_days(t1.end_time)=to_days(now())
